title: Blue Lock Custom GUI Pack
body:
**![Preview Image](https://i.imgur.com/hxWDhhE.png)**

**Introduction:**
It's GUI ONLY Resource pack so you can freely use it with other resource packs. Just place it on top of resource pack you use.

This is a GUI packed themed towards the show "Blue Lock" . Don't hesitate to comment down below , I have even changed hot bar as well hope you enjoy.

The palette that I choose is light blue & green & purple but maybe in the future.
If you guys want other colors like Red & white or any colors else.
please tell me I will think about it!

If you found any bugs please report to me I will fix it as soon as I can.

**Feature Highlights:**
- **Settings:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/9IFkbmw.png)
- **Hud:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/nw0F3NB.png)
- **Chest:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/AJQWhyV.png)
- **Anvil:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/47EimEA.png)
- **Loom:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/S89VMTc.png)
- **Brewing Stand:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/8LQNVYq.png)
- **Crafting Table:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/eBtZO1T.png)
- **Furnace:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/5sVluU0.png)
- **Cartography Table:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/qbwwEPN.png)
- **Shulker Box:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/maCQvpF.png)
- **Beacon Settings:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/NJUKdHx.png)
- **Villager Trading Menu:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/Aw6xeNL.png)

**Community Engagement:**
Join our Discord server to suggest and vote for the next pack, participate in discussions, and have a chance to win Discord Nitro giveaways every month. [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph)

**Thank you for your support! ❤️**
